# Economics Investment Markets L2

> Link economics to investment markets — PV model, real default-free rates, business cycle effects on yield curve, credit premium, equity risk premium, and commercial real estate pricing

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** portfolio-management · economics · business-cycle · yield-curve · erp · credit-premium · cfa-level-2

## What this does

Link economics to investment markets — PV model, real default-free rates, business cycle effects on yield curve, credit premium, equity risk premium, and commercial real estate pricing

Specifies 2 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **asset_class** *(text, required)* — Asset class identifier
- **analysis_type** *(select, required)* — real_rates | yield_curve | credit | equity | real_estate

## What must be true

- **present_value_model → framework:** Asset price = PV of expected future cash flows at risk-adjusted discount rate
- **present_value_model → discount_rate:** Risk-free + relevant risk premia
- **present_value_model → expectations:** Price reflects consensus cash flow and discount rate expectations
- **real_default_free_rates → short_run:** Set by monetary policy; tracks inflation expectations
- **real_default_free_rates → long_run:** Co-moves with trend real GDP growth (Fisher)
- **real_default_free_rates → cyclicality:** Rise in expansion, fall in recession
- **real_default_free_rates → uncertainty_premium:** Compensation for real rate uncertainty over investment horizon
- **business_cycle_and_rates → early_expansion:** Short rates rising; curve steep
- **business_cycle_and_rates → peak:** Short rates highest; curve may invert
- **business_cycle_and_rates → recession:** Rates cut; curve steepens; credit spreads widen
- **business_cycle_and_rates → recovery:** Rates low; curve steep; risk assets rally
- **yield_curve_cycle → short_rate_tbills:** Tracks central bank policy; most cyclical
- **yield_curve_cycle → term_spread:** Long − short; leading indicator of economic activity
- **yield_curve_cycle → break_even_inflation:** Nominal − real (TIPS) yield; market-implied inflation
- **yield_curve_cycle → slope_as_predictor:** Inverted curve has historically preceded recession by 12-18 months
- **credit_premium → definition:** Yield spread over default-free for default risk + liquidity
- **credit_premium → cyclicality:** Widens in recession; tightens in expansion
- **credit_premium → sovereign_credit:** Distinct from corporate; driven by fiscal position, FX reserves
- **credit_premium → industry_factors:** Sector cyclicality affects credit quality
- **equity_risk_premium → definition:** Expected equity return above risk-free
- **equity_risk_premium → bad_consumption_outcomes:** Equities fall in recessions — compensation required
- **equity_risk_premium → earnings_cycle:** Corporate profits highly pro-cyclical
- **equity_risk_premium → valuation_multiples:** P/E expands when growth expected; contracts in stress
- **equity_risk_premium → size_of_erp:** Historically 3-6% long-run for developed markets
- **commercial_real_estate → pricing_formula:** V = NOI / cap_rate
- **commercial_real_estate → cap_rate_cycle:** Falls in expansion (prices rise); rises in recession (prices fall)
- **commercial_real_estate → cash_flow_cycle:** Vacancy rises in recession; rents fall
- **commercial_real_estate → real_estate_cycle_lag:** Follows economic cycle with 1-2 quarter lag
- **validation → asset_required:** asset_class present
- **validation → valid_analysis:** analysis_type in [real_rates, yield_curve, credit, equity, real_estate]

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Analyse Macro Investment** — when asset_class exists; analysis_type in ["real_rates","yield_curve","credit","equity","real_estate"], then call service; emit macro.analysed. _Why: Analyse economics and investment market linkage._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Invalid Analysis** — when analysis_type not_in ["real_rates","yield_curve","credit","equity","real_estate"], then emit macro.rejected. _Why: Unsupported analysis type._ *(error: `MACRO_INVALID_ANALYSIS`)*

## Errors it can return

- `MACRO_INVALID_ANALYSIS` — analysis_type must be one of the supported types

## Events

**`macro.analysed`**
  Payload: `asset_class`, `analysis_type`, `cycle_phase`, `risk_premium_estimate`, `relative_value`

**`macro.rejected`**
  Payload: `asset_class`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **term-structure-interest-rate-dynamics-l2** *(recommended)*
- **active-portfolio-management-l2** *(recommended)*
